summary: Frontend-only testing of /about page redesign with Precision Craft design system. All 58+ test cases passed across desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Page renders correctly with all 12 sections.
context_for_next_testing_agent: About page fully tested with Precision Craft design system. All 12 sections verified: Hero (background, breadcrumb, eyebrow, title, subtitle, 4 trust badges), Meet Andrei (2 photos from customer-assets CDN, photo caption, 4 stat pills, About Andrei text block with 3 paragraphs, quote with attribution), Watch in Action (2 YouTube iframes WBEc8Lz2saA and ottiV_KfcUI with captions and Book button), Our Story (3 paragraphs, highlighted quote with orange border), Why Choose Us (4 cards with ghost numbers 01-04), Andrei In His Own Words (3 Q&A cards on navy background), Service Area (3 region groups: SF 1 city, Peninsula 8 cities, Marin 12 cities - total 21 city pill links), Reviews carousel (6 reviews with Google icon, Verified badge, 5 stars, review text, author, date, Read on Google link - desktop shows 2 cards, mobile shows 1 card, auto-advance every 5s with pause on hover), Final CTA (Call and Book buttons), Footer (logo, phone, copyright 2026), Floating BOOK REPAIR button (desktop after 300px scroll), Mobile sticky bar (CALL, BOOK ONLINE, TEXT US). All phone links use tel:7605435733, all book links use /book?go=1. Data-testid attributes present on all key sections. SEO verified: title, meta description, canonical URL, LocalBusiness and BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schemas.
